policy.title: Carbon Disclosure Protocol
policy.summary: Mandates published carbon accounting for all node operations, with quarterly disclosure formats aligned to open standards.

policy.title: Resource Efficiency Directive
policy.summary: Sets efficiency targets for compute, storage, and network subsystems; non-conformance triggers governance review.

programs.title: Green Procurement Program
programs.summary: Prefers low-carbon infrastructure providers and hardware vendors with verifiable sustainability claims.

programs.title: Citizen Sustainability Fellowship
programs.summary: Supports citizen contributions to environmental auditing, awareness, and compliance tooling.

programs.title: Zero-Waste Operations Sprint
programs.summary: Targets operational waste reduction across node maintenance, documentation, and civic program logistics.

standards.title: Green Protocol Eligibility
standards.summary: Services and integrations must meet energy and data-efficiency thresholds to carry the green protocol label.
